annotations.description: Xid 107 SMBPBI_TEST_MESSAGE_SILENT: SMBPBI Test Message Silent
Xid 109 ROBUST_CHANNEL_CTXSW_TIMEOUT_ERROR: Context Switch Timeout Error
Xid 11 ROBUST_CHANNEL_GR_ERROR_MISSING_HW: Invalid or corrupted push buffer stream
Xid 13 ROBUST_CHANNEL_GR_EXCEPTION / ROBUST_CHANNEL_GR_ERROR_SW_NOTIFY: Graphics Engine Exception
Xid 141 ROBUST_CHANNEL_FAST_PATH_ERROR: CUDA Fast Path Error
Xid 154 GPU_RECOVERY_ACTION_CHANGED: GPU Recovery Action Changed
Xid 155 NVLINK_SW_DEFINED_ERROR: NVLINK: SW Defined Error
Xid 162 PSHC_REENGAGED: Power Smoothing HW Circuitry capability reengaged
Xid 163 PSHC_DISENGAGED: Power Smoothing HW Circuitry capability disengaged
Xid 164 PSHC_LOW_LIFETIME: Power Smoothing HW Circuitry low lifetime reached
Xid 165 PSHC_ZERO_LIFETIME: Power Smoothing HW Circuitry lifetime exhausted
Xid 166 NVLINK_SECURE_CRYPTO_ERR: CC traffic seen prior to link properly being configured for encrypted traffic
Xid 168 REDUCED_GPU_MEMORY_CAPACITY: Errors found in WPR (write protected region)
Xid 170 NVLINK_SECURE_OTHER: Interrupt seen in CC mode
Xid 171 UNCORRECTABLE_DRAM_ERROR: Additional to Xid 48 providing more details on particulars of fault to differentiate DRAM/SRAM
Xid 172 UNCORRECTABLE_SRAM_ERROR: Additional to Xid 48 providing more details on particulars of fault to differentiate DRAM/SRAM
Xid 25 ROBUST_CHANNEL_GR_ILLEGAL_NOTIFY: Invalid or illegal push buffer stream
Xid 31 ROBUST_CHANNEL_FIFO_ERROR_MMU_ERR_FLT: GPU memory page fault
Xid 32 ROBUST_CHANNEL_PBDMA_ERROR: Invalid or corrupted push buffer stream
Xid 44 ROBUST_CHANNEL_GR_FAULT_DURING_CTXSW: Graphics Engine fault during context switch
Xid 45 ROBUST_CHANNEL_PREEMPTIVE_REMOVAL: Preemptive cleanup, due to previous errors -- Most likely to see when running multiple cuda applications and hitting a DBE
Xid 48 ROBUST_CHANNEL_GPU_ECC_DBE: Double Bit ECC Error
Xid 54 SILENT_RUNNING_PWR_REDUCED_CLOCKING: Auxiliary power is not connected to the GPU board
Xid 62 PMU_HALT_ERROR: Internal micro-controller halt (newer drivers)
Xid 63 INFOROM_DRAM_RETIREMENT_EVENT: GPU memory remapping event
Xid 64 INFOROM_DRAM_RETIREMENT_FAILURE: GPU memory remapping failure
Xid 67 ROBUST_CHANNEL_FECS_ERR_VERIF_VIOLATION: Illegal access by driver
Xid 69 ROBUST_CHANNEL_GR_CLASS_ERROR: Graphics Engine class error
Xid 79 ROBUST_CHANNEL_GPU_HAS_FALLEN_OFF_THE_BUS: GPU has fallen off the bus
Xid 80 PBDMA_PUSHBUFFER_CRC_MISMATCH: Corrupted data sent to GPU
Xid 92 EXCESSIVE_SBE_INTERRUPTS: High single-bit ECC error rate
Xid 93 INFOROM_ERASE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Non-fatal violation of provisioned InfoROM wear limit
